## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / tooling
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/`, or `ci/`
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, …)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes (or ran `pnpm format`)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
